title: Star Wars Adventures 12: Podrace to Freedom
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 12}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures12-Book.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 12:
Podrace to Freedom'' |author=[[A. L. Singer]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[September]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 12: Podrace to Freedom]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 12|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 12]], which was released in [[September]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=77 |isbn=9780439458917 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 11: Danger on Naboo|Danger on Naboo]]'' |followed by="[[Star Wars Adventures 13: The Final Battle|The Final Battle]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 12: Podrace to Freedom''''' was the ninth installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 14: Podrace to Freedom]]''. It consisted of a young reader novel and an accompanying game book for use with the story, and was sent out with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 12|''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 12]] in [[September]] [[2003]]. ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures12-Book.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures12-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{:Episode I Adventures 14: Podrace to Freedom}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticAdventuresNav}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თავგადასავლები 12: პოდრბოლა თავისუფლებისთვის }} [[Category:Star Wars Adventures books|Adventures 12]]
